texts.text: How do you charge money?

We charge a $9 service charge (paid by the worker) to activate Job Finder. If we don’t find you a job within 90 days, your $9 is fully refunded. Employers never pay platform fees. You can pay securely from WhatsApp here: https://buy.stripe.com/fZueVcdG1bglfgr1nc0ZW00 — payment will automatically activate your Job Finder. Would you like me to help you complete the payment?
How does job finder work?

Hi — Job Finder is our job-matching service that you activate with a $9 service charge (paid here: https://buy.stripe.com/fZueVcdG1bglfgr1nc0ZW00). Payment automatically turns on your Job Finder and you get a full refund if we don’t find you a job within 90 days. Once activated, our team checks your documents and matches you with verified employers across Europe, creates contracts, handles visa support and embassy communication, arranges airport pickup, and provides ongoing support (residence extensions, etc.). Typical processing time is 2–8 weeks depending on the country. Would you like me to help you pay now or answer any other questions about the process?
I want to see what kind of jobs you have before paying.

We offer hospitality jobs across Europe (hotels, restaurants, catering). To protect worker privacy and give you the best match, current vacancy lists are available only after you activate Job Finder. Activate Job Finder with a $9 service charge here: https://buy.stripe.com/fZueVcdG1bglfgr1nc0ZW00 — payment turns on matching and we’ll verify documents, create contracts, handle visa and embassy communication, arrange airport pickup, and provide ongoing support. Full refund if no job is found within 90 days. Would you like me to help you complete the payment now?
In which country?

We offer hospitality jobs across Europe — we verify employers, create contracts, handle visa and embassy communication, arrange airport pickup, and provide ongoing support. To see country-specific vacancies, activate Job Finder by paying the $9 service charge at workersunited.eu/signup — this turns on matching and you’ll get a full refund if no job is found within 90 days. Would you like help activating it?
[Template: profile_incomplete] there, almost ready, complete your registration and join the job queue
Can't upload documents

Hi there — the required documents are: passport, diploma or work certificate, and a biometric photo. You can upload them in your dashboard (log in at workersunited.eu/signup) or send them here on WhatsApp — both update the same profile. If you still can’t upload, email contact@workersunited.eu for help. Would you like to try uploading the documents here now?
[Template: profile_incomplete] SANAE, almost ready, complete your registration and join the job queue
Hello. I think there's a problem with the site, because I completed my profile, but it's still marked as incomplete, and the "Full Name" field is showing as missing

Hi Sanae — thank you, and sorry for the trouble. This usually happens when the Full Name field wasn’t saved or the profile didn’t sync. Please open your dashboard, go to Profile, confirm the Full Name is entered exactly, click Save, then refresh or log out and back in (dashboard and WhatsApp update the same profile). If it still shows incomplete, try a different browser or clear cache. If the problem persists, please send a screenshot here or email contact@workersunited.eu and we’ll escalate it for you. Would you like to send a screenshot now?
I tried the solutions you've given me but the problem persists. Here are the screenshots showing that even after entering the full name and correctly saving it, it still shows incomplete

Sorry for the trouble — thanks for sending the screenshots. I can escalate this to our technical team and forward the screenshots plus your account details so they can investigate. May I forward them now? Meanwhile, please try once more: open your dashboard → Profile, retype the Full Name (remove any extra spaces or special characters), click Save, then refresh or log out and back in (or try a different browser/device). If you prefer to email directly, send the screenshots to contact@workersunited.eu with your full name and this phone number.
[unsupported message]
[image message]
[image message]
[image message]

Thanks — I can escalate this. May I forward your screenshots and account details (phone + email) to our technical team now so they can investigate? Meanwhile, if you’d like to try once more: open Dashboard → Profile, retype the Full Name (remove extra spaces/special characters), Save, then log out and back in or try a different browser/device. You can also email contact@workersunited.eu with the screenshots if you prefer.

Thanks — I got the screenshots. I can escalate this to our technical team now and forward the images plus your account details (Full name, phone +212656548490, email sanae.benyoussef11@gmail.com) so they can investigate why the Profile still shows incomplete. May I forward these now? If you prefer, you can also email the same screenshots to contact@workersunited.eu.

Thanks, Sanae — I’ve received your screenshots. I can escalate this to our technical team and forward the images plus your account details so they can investigate. May I forward them now? If you prefer, you can instead email contact@workersunited.eu (or tell me your browser/device to include).

Thanks — I received your screenshots. I’ll forward them now, along with your account details, to our technical team so they can investigate the “Full Name” sync issue. They’ll get back to you here or by email. If you prefer, you can also send the same screenshots to contact@workersunited.eu. Do you want me to add any extra note for the tech team before I send it?
Yes please, do forward it to the tech team

Done — I’ve forwarded your screenshots, Full Name, phone (+212656548490) and email (sanae.benyoussef11@gmail.com) with a short note about the “Full Name” not syncing to our technical team. They’ll investigate and reply here on WhatsApp or by email. Would you like me to add which browser/device you used to the ticket (this often helps)? If you prefer, you can also email contact@workersunited.eu directly.
I used two browsers, chrome and the default one

Thanks — noted. I’ve added that you used Chrome and the default browser to the tech ticket. Would you like me to add the device/OS (example: Android 12, iPhone 13) as well? The tech team will reply here or by email (contact@workersunited.eu) when they have an update.
I use Android 15

Thanks — I’ve added Android 15 (plus Chrome and the default browser) to your tech ticket. The technical team will investigate and reply here on WhatsApp or to sanae.benyoussef11@gmail.com. Would you like me to ask them to prioritise this ticket or add any extra note?
Thank you very much, your help is appreciated

You’re very welcome — happy to help. I’ve forwarded your screenshots, account details (phone +212656548490, email sanae.benyoussef11@gmail.com) and device info (Android 15, Chrome + default browser) to the technical team; they’ll reply here on WhatsApp or to contact@workersunited.eu. If you want me to prioritise the ticket or add any extra note, tell me and I’ll update the tech team.
Ok, I'll be waiting for the tech team to reply

Thanks — noted. The technical team will investigate and reply here on WhatsApp or to sanae.benyoussef11@gmail.com. If you need anything while you wait, you can also email contact@workersunited.eu. Would you like me to ask the tech team to prioritise your ticket?
No need, thanks

Understood — I won’t prioritise the ticket. The technical team will investigate and reply here or to sanae.benyoussef11@gmail.com when they have an update. If you need anything else meantime, message me here or email contact@workersunited.eu.
Hi you doing Respected team

Hello — we’re doing well, thank you! How can I help you today? If you want to get started with Job Finder, please register first at workersunited.eu/signup. After signup you can continue here on WhatsApp or in the dashboard — what would you like to do next?
Hi

Hi — great to hear from you! How can I help today? If you want to start Job Finder, please register first at workersunited.eu/signup. After signup you can continue here on WhatsApp or in the dashboard. Do you need help signing up or with the required documents (passport, diploma/work certificate, biometric photo)?
Hi

Hi — great to see you! How can I help today? To get started with Job Finder, please register first at workersunited.eu/signup. After signup you can continue here on WhatsApp or in the dashboard. If you need help signing up or with the required documents (passport, diploma or work certificate, biometric photo), tell me which one and I’ll assist.
Hi, I have a question about Workers United

Hi — thanks for reaching out! Workers United is a full‑service hiring and visa‑support platform. To get started please register at workersunited.eu/signup; after signup you can continue in the dashboard or here on WhatsApp. If you mean the Job Finder service: after you create a profile you can activate searching with a $9 service charge (full refund if you don’t receive a job offer within 90 days). Are you already registered, or what would you like to know next? For support you can also email contact@workersunited.eu.

Hi, I have a question about Workers United

I can help — our records show you’re not registered yet. Please sign up first at workersunited.eu/signup. After signup you can continue in the dashboard or here on WhatsApp; we’ll search for suitable matches during the 90-day Job Finder period. The service charge to activate Job Finder is $9 (fully refunded if you don’t receive a job offer within 90 days). What would you like to ask about Workers United — documents, countries, timing, or how Job Finder works?
Such a waste of time it took me two days to finally upload my documents and now I'm being told I'm not registered

Sorry about the frustration — that must be annoying. Our records still show you’re not registered, which usually happens if the signup form wasn’t completed; documents only attach after you create a profile at workersunited.eu/signup. Please finish the signup at workersunited.eu/signup, then check your dashboard to confirm the passport, diploma/work certificate, and biometric photo are uploaded. You can also continue here on WhatsApp after signup. If you already completed signup and still see “not registered,” email contact@workersunited.eu or tell me the email/phone you used and I’ll help check. Did you finish the signup form at workersunited.eu/signup with this phone number?
Hi, I have a question about Workers United

Hi Saidkhan — thanks for reaching out. I can help — I see you already have a registered profile but haven’t activated Job Finder yet (the $9 service charge is unpaid and admin approval is pending). What would you like to know: documents, timing, or ready to activate Job Finder now? (Required documents: passport, diploma/work certificate, and a biometric photo.) You can continue in your dashboard or here on WhatsApp — or email contact@workersunited.eu for support.

Next step is to activate Job Finder: pay the $9 service charge at workersunited.eu/signup to start our 90-day search (full refund if you don’t receive a job offer within 90 days). After activation we’ll look for Cleaning Services roles across Europe and you can continue in the dashboard or here on WhatsApp. Required documents to upload: passport, diploma or work certificate, and a biometric photo. Would you like to activate Job Finder now or do you need help with the document upload?
Hi, I have a question about Workers United
How do you guys operate

Hi — we’re Workers United, a full-service hiring and visa-support platform (not a public job board). To get started, please register at workersunited.eu/signup. After signup you can continue in the dashboard or right here on WhatsApp — both update the same profile. What would you like to ask first: registration help, required documents, or how Job Finder works?
I live in the gulf

We’re a full-service hiring and visa-support platform that finds and manages jobs across Europe for workers. You start by registering at workersunited.eu/signup — after your profile is created we run Job Finder, a paid search service that you activate with a $9 service charge (registration/profile comes first). Job Finder searches for a match over a 90-day period; if you don’t receive a job offer within 90 days the $9 is fully refunded. There is no public list of vacancies — openings appear over time and we search until we find a suitable match. Required documents: passport, diploma or work certificate, and a biometric photo. Processing time typically takes 2–8 weeks depending on the country; employers never pay platform fees. For more help you can email contact@workersunited.eu. Which country are you interested in working in?

That’s fine — you can apply from the Gulf. We offer jobs across Europe! Pay $9 at workersunited.eu/signup to start, and we find the best match for you. Full refund if no job in 90 days. Please register first at workersunited.eu/signup; after signup you can continue in the dashboard or here on WhatsApp. Which European country would you like to work in?
Portugal

Great — we can help with Portugal. Please register first at workersunited.eu/signup; after you create your profile you can continue in the dashboard or here on WhatsApp. We offer jobs across Europe! Job Finder is a paid search service you activate with a $9 service charge after registration; we search for a match over 90 days and refund the $9 if you don’t receive an offer. We don’t keep a public list of vacancies. Required documents: passport, diploma or work certificate, and a biometric photo. Processing typically takes 2–8 weeks. Want help registering now or do you have questions about documents or the process?
Hi, I have a question about Workers United

Hi Riyazbeg — happy to help. What would you like to know about Workers United? I see you already have a registered profile (status: NEW; entry fee not paid). To start Job Finder you can activate it in your dashboard or here — activation requires a $9 service charge. Would you like to activate Job Finder now, or do you have a specific question about documents, timing, or your profile status?
I have questions regarding agency

Do you mean you’re an agency/employer, or are you a worker asking how agencies work with Workers United? If you’re an agency or employer, please email contact@workersunited.eu for partnership/onboarding details — employers never pay platform fees. If you’re a worker asking about agencies, I can explain how we match workers with verified employers and how to activate Job Finder in your dashboard. Which one is it?
No
Thanks — I may have misunderstood. Could you briefly tell me what you want to know about agencies (are you an agency/employer, or a worker asking about how agencies work with Workers United)?
What kind of job opportunity you providing for overseas workers at europe??

We place overseas workers across Europe in a range of sectors (for example: hospitality, caregiving, agriculture, manufacturing, logistics). We handle the full process — document checks, contract creation, visa support, embassy communication and airport pickup — but we don’t keep a public list of vacancies; matches appear over time and are found through our Job Finder search. We offer jobs across Europe! Pay $9 at workersunited.eu/signup to start, and we find the best match for you. Full refund if no job in 90 days. I see your profile is registered — would you like me to activate Job Finder now and send the payment link?
